name: Several UI changes to control dropdown. - Move the Update Refine to the manageme

rounds.prompt:
Several UI changes to control dropdown.
- Move the Update Refine to the management section.
- Update the Command Palette button to match design of the items in the management section
- Make the Control button match the layout of the New Goal button dropdown, but keep the white color. It needs to be the same height, have the divider line between controls label and arrow.
- In general, I'm looking for a consistent menu design.
